result.cover_letter:
18 July 2026

Hiring Team
The Administrator Group
Re: Administrator

Dear Hiring Team at The Administrator Group,

My background as an Administrator is a direct match for the Administrator role at The Administrator Group. My experience leading operational cadence, capacity planning, and executive reporting for a multi-squad government program directly addresses the core requirement to own operational delivery and reporting for the delivery office.

The role calls for operations leadership, process re-engineering, and delivery ownership. As Scrum Master at the Australian Taxation Office, I led end-to-end delivery for the Agile Kookaburras squad, owning sprint cadence, PI Planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting. I re-engineered a mathematically infeasible SIT window—75+ hours of manual evidence against 64 available hours—into an achievable plan through a tiered harness build with a formal go/no-go gate. The job description also requires continuous improvement and stakeholder management. I convened a cross-discipline technical war room that produced a binding automation recommendation in under three hours, and I authored the executive change request re-baselining test capacity from 30 to up to 90 person-days, including options analysis and risk assessment with full Azure DevOps traceability. My collaborative approach is grounded in steering cross-functional squads and unblocking stalled function testing through targeted SME enablement, which kept Distribution UI delivery at 95%+ completion.

I am available to discuss how this operational and process improvement experience can support the delivery office. I can make time for a call this Thursday or Friday morning and would welcome the opportunity to walk through the specific cadences and reporting structures I have managed.

Sincerely,
Administrator
